changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Not Feeling so Hot."

TextENGNew: ``Keiichi-kun hasn't been himself lately. Maybe he's in a bad mood.``
``Who knows. Maybe he's lovesick~?``
``M-Mii-chan, that's a huge leap...!``
``Ahyahyahyahya!!``
``...What do you think?``
``Beats me.``
``Could it be that Kei-chan... Maybe...?``
``...I don't know.``
``That day, the man Kei-chan was talking to in the car—he was a heavyset, middle-aged guy, right?``
``Yeah. No doubt about it.``
``That Ooishi... I wonder what he's been filling Kei-chan's head with...``
changeReason: Old asserts Ooishi 'probably fed him something fishy' (stating it as likely fact); new uses 'I wonder what he's been filling Kei-chan's head with' matching the wondering/speculative tone of JPN のかなぁ (I wonder).

TextENGNew: ``It looked serious. Keiichi-kun's face was white as a sheet.``
``...Listen, Rena, you might not know this, but...``
``That man is actually a messenger of Oyashiro-sama.``
changeReason: Old uses 'the messenger' (definite article) implying Ooishi is the sole/specific emissary of Oyashiro-sama; new uses 'a messenger' (indefinite), changing the implied uniqueness of the role.

TextENGNew: ``Huh? What do you mean?``
``Whenever he shows up... someone always gets spirited away by the demon. ...It's true.``
changeReason: New includes 'always' matching JPN 必ず (without fail/always), emphasizing the certainty and inevitability of the pattern that old translation omitted.

TextENGNew: ``...Huh? Really?``
``...The year before last, when Rika-chan's mother drowned herself, right? Ooishi had been interrogating her just before it happened.``
changeReason: Two significant changes: 'drowned' (possibly accidental) becomes 'drowned herself' matching JPN 入水 (suicide by drowning); and 'visited by Ooishi' becomes 'Ooishi had been interrogating her' matching JPN 尋問 (interrogation), which implies a much more adversarial interaction.

TextENGNew: ``...Come to think of it, he was around right before Satoshi-kun transferred away, too.``
``Transferred~? Ahahahahahaha, you really are sweet, Rena.``
``And now he's appeared before Keiichi-kun... Does that mean Keiichi-kun will be spirited away too?``
A heavy silence lingered between them.@kAnd then it suddenly broke.
````Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha.````
...It was raucous laughter.
